Gunman

Gatillero

6.6
2025MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

A former hitman accepts a minor job for his former boss. However, in a corrupt neighborhood, nothing is what it seems, and he quickly gets caught in a web of unexpected events. A race against time and his own destiny.
